name: Hawaiian Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Pineapple chunks in juice (drain; reserve juice)
1 medium Apple, unpeeled and cored, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, turkey, pineapple, water chestnuts, apple, nuts, and salt.
2. Toss lightly with yogurt and 1 tablespoon of pineapple juice.
3. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish with coconut.
Each serving provides:
291 calories
17.4 g. protein
9.9 g. fat
33.6 g. carbohydrate
239 mg. sodium
35 mg. cholesterol
Source: Brown Rice
